name: should create a rushing yards split by week
description: Test case for should create a rushing yards split by week
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2020,2021,2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "player_years_weeks" as (SELECT player_years.pid, nfl_year_week_timestamp.year, nfl_year_week_timestamp.week FROM player_years INNER JOIN nfl_year_week_timestamp ON player_years.year = nfl_year_week_timestamp.year), "ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec" as (select COALESCE(bc_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."week", "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(rush_yds) as rush_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."week", "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(bc_pid)), "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279" as (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(rush_yds) AS team_rush_yds_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."week" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."week"), "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats" as (select "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279"."nfl_team", sum(t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279.team_rush_yds_from_plays) as team_rush_yds_from_plays, "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279"."year", "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279"."week" from "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279" group by "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279"."nfl_team", "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279"."year", "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279"."week") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec"."rush_yds_from_plays" AS "rush_yds_from_plays_0", "t287c2fe45da938bac75fe7035039000b"."ry" AS "week_projected_rush_yds_0", "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats"."team_rush_yds_from_plays" AS "team_rush_yds_from_plays_0", "player_years"."year", "player_years_weeks"."week", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" inner join "player_years_weeks" on "player_years_weeks"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_years_weeks"."year" = "player_years"."year" left join "ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec" on "ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec"."pid" = "player"."pid" and ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec.year = player_years.year and ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec.year IN (2020,2021,2022,2023) and ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec.week = player_years_weeks.week left join "projections_index" as "t287c2fe45da938bac75fe7035039000b" on "t287c2fe45da938bac75fe7035039000b"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t287c2fe45da938bac75fe7035039000b.year = player_years.year and t287c2fe45da938bac75fe7035039000b.year IN (2020,2021,2022,2023) and t287c2fe45da938bac75fe7035039000b.week = player_years_weeks.week and "t287c2fe45da938bac75fe7035039000b"."sourceid" = 18 and "t287c2fe45da938bac75fe7035039000b"."seas_type" = 'REG' left join "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats" on "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "player"."current_nfl_team" and "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats"."week" = "player_years_weeks"."week" and t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats.year = player_years.year and t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats.year IN (2020,2021,2022,2023) and t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats.week = player_years_weeks.week group by player.fname, player.lname, "ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec"."rush_yds_from_plays", "t287c2fe45da938bac75fe7035039000b"."ry", "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats"."team_rush_yds_from_plays", "player_years"."year", "player_years_weeks"."week", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
